title: Microbiological testing
body_html:
For the MRCEM exam you should be familiar with the following stains:

StainUsed to detectSpecimen
ZN (Ziehl Neelsen stain)acid fast bacilli i.e TBsputum
Giemsamalariablood film
GramVarious bacteriaBlood/sputum/CSF/others


Although knowledge of the above is expected this doesn't mean that they are gold standard tests. Malaria for example should be diagnosed following multiple blood films (usually 3 sets within 36 hours and often examined under flurescent microscope) whilst TB should have formal cultures.
4
100
